widgets_values:
Slow-burning TV talk show, mystical atmosphere. The warm-toned set is bathed in soft studio lighting, accentuating the flickering candles, slowly pulsing pentagrams, and glowing magic orbs.

A 37-year-old man, the host, sits on a plush couch wearing an ornate occult hat, his expression warm and inviting. Beside him, an enormous cat-like creature, adorned with a paper mask, wags its tail and subtly adjusts its ears, exuding a curious, playful demeanor.

The camera begins with a wide shot, capturing the host and the guest in a single frame, then slowly zooms in.

The host raises both hands, palms facing the camera, in a welcoming gesture. "Доброго всего, мои сокровенные! У нас сегодня специальный гость, которого мы давно ждали!" he says in Russian, his voice smooth and soothing. 

As the host finishes speaking, the feline creature dips its head in a courteous bow, its whiskers twitching slightly.

The man's hands come together in a gentle clasp, releasing a subtle, mystical glow around them. "Вселенская ко то та!" He smiles warmly at the camera, inviting the viewer to join the conversation. 

The camera lingers on the host's expectant face, then pans out to encompass the entire set once more.

nodes.title: Sets Frame Duration Based on Audio Duration

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
